title: Volatility Psychology and Risk Sizing
description: Market volatility amplifies behavioral biases such as panic selling and leverage chasing. Risk sizing discipline matters more than prediction accuracy for long-term survival.

resources.title: Bitcoin Design
resources.notes: Practical user-facing guidance that can reduce impulsive behavior during volatility.
